title: Joby Aviation Stock Forecast & Analyst Predictions
text: Wall Street analyst sentiment shows 3 Buy, 5 Hold, and 3 Sell ratings from 11 analysts covering the stock. Based on analysis of 10 Wall Street analysts, JOBY has a neutral consensus with a median price target of $11.50 ranging from $6.00 to $18.00. Recent earnings revealed a Q1 revenue of $24 million significantly exceeding expectations, yet the company grapples with an ongoing ITC probe that threatens its market access and partnerships. Joby Aviation shares rose 19.24 percent to $10.35 after strong Q1 results and confirmation of a 2026 timeline for commercial operations. The most optimistic forecast comes from Chris Pierce at Needham, projecting a 71.6 percent upside. Conversely, the most conservative target is provided by Bill Peterson at JP Morgan, suggesting a 42.8 percent downside. Overall, retail investor sentiment appears cautiously optimistic given the strong Q1 earnings results and progress toward commercial operations. A target price of $11.63 for Joby Aviation over the next 12 months suggests a 10.88 percent upside from current price levels.
